revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Helpbox
| name = WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar
| class = plainlist collapsible {{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|collapsed |collapsed}}
| float = {{{float|right}}}
| titlestyle = font-size:100%;padding:0.5em;
| title = {{resize|130%|[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Infoboxes|WikiProject Infoboxes]]}}<!--(resized here otherwise [show/hide] link also resized)-->
| headingstyle = font-size:105%;

| list1 = {{raise|0.25em|[[Wikipedia:List of infoboxes|List of infoboxes]]}}

| group2 = Style and help
| list2 =
*[[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Infoboxes|Manual of Style/Infoboxes]]
*[[Help:Infobox]]

| group3 = Cleanup
| list3 =
 {{Sidebar |child=yes |navbar=off
  | heading1 = Talk page
  | content1 =
*{{tl|Cleanup infobox}}
*{{tl|New infobox}}
*{{tl|Infobox requested}}
  | heading2 = Article
  | content2 =
*{{tl|Missing-taxobox}}
 }}

| group4 = Building
| list4 =
*{{tl|Infobox}}
*[[Wikipedia:List of infoboxes/Proposed|List of infoboxes/Proposed]]

| group5 = To do 
| list5 =
* [[:Category:Wikipedia articles with an infobox request|Add infobox]]
* [[:Category:Pages needing an infobox conversion|Change template used]]
* [[:Category:Wikipedia infobox cleanup|Cleanup contents]]
* [[:Category:Templates suitable for conversion to use Template:Infobox|Convert to use <nowiki>{{</nowiki>Infobox}}]]
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Helpbox
| name = WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar
| class = plainlist collapsible {{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|collapsed |collapsed}}
| float = {{{float|right}}}
| titlestyle = font-size:100%;padding:0.5em;
| title = {{resize|130%|[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Infoboxes|WikiProject Infoboxes]]}}<!--(resized here otherwise [show/hide] link also resized)-->
| headingstyle = font-size:105%;

| list1 = {{raise|0.25em|[[Wikipedia:List of infoboxes|List of infoboxes]]}}

| group2 = Style and help
| list2 =
*[[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Infoboxes|Manual of Style/Infoboxes]]
*[[Help:Infobox]]

| group3 = Cleanup
| list3 =
 {{Sidebar |child=yes |navbar=off
  | heading1 = Talk page
  | content1 =
*{{tl|Cleanup infobox}}
*{{tl|New infobox}}
*{{tl|Infobox requested}}
  | heading2 = Article
  | content2 =
*{{tl|Missing-taxobox}}
 }}

| group4 = Building
| list4 =
*{{tl|Infobox}}
*[[Wikipedia:List of infoboxes/Proposed|List of infoboxes/Proposed]]

| group5 = To do 
| list5 =
* [[:Category:Wikipedia articles with an infobox request|Add infobox]]
* [[:Category:Pages needing an infobox conversion|Change template used]]
* [[:Category:Wikipedia infobox cleanup|Cleanup contents]]
* [[:Category:Templates suitable for conversion to use Template:Infobox|Convert to use <nowiki>{{</nowiki>Infobox}}]]
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{Helpbox
| name = WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar
| class = plainlist collapsible {{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|collapsed |collapsed}}
| float = {{{float|right}}}
| titlestyle = font-size:100%;padding:0.5em;

| group2 = Style and help

  | heading1 = Talk page
  | content1 =
*{{tl|Cleanup infobox}}
*{{tl|New infobox}}
*{{tl|Infobox requested}}
  | heading2 = Article
  | content2 =

 }}

| group4 = Building

| group5 = To do

* [[:Category:Wikipedia infobox cleanup|Cleanup contents]]
* [[:Category:s suitable for conversion to use Template:Infobox|Convert to use <nowiki>{{</nowiki>Infobox}}]]
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Helpbox
| name = WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar
| class = plainlist collapsible {{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|collapsed |collapsed}}
| float = {{{float|right}}}
| titlestyle = font-size:100%;padding:0.5em;
| title = {{resize|130%|[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Infoboxes|WikiProject Infoboxes]]}}<!--(resized here otherwise [show/hide] link also resized)-->
| headingstyle = font-size:105%;

| list1 = {{raise|0.25em|[[Wikipedia:List of infoboxes|List of infoboxes]]}}

| group2 = Style and help
| list2 =
*[[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Infoboxes|Manual of Style/Infoboxes]]
*[[Help:Infobox]]

| group3 = Cleanup
| list3 =
 {{Sidebar |child=yes |navbar=off
  | heading1 = Talk page
  | content1 =
*{{tl|Cleanup infobox}}
*{{tl|New infobox}}
*{{tl|Infobox requested}}
  | heading2 = Article
  | content2 =
*{{tl|Missing-taxobox}}
 }}

| group4 = Building
| list4 =
*{{tl|Infobox}}
*[[Wikipedia:List of infoboxes/Proposed|List of infoboxes/Proposed]]

| group5 = To do 
| list5 =
* [[:Category:Wikipedia articles with an infobox request|Add infobox]]
* [[:Category:Pages needing an infobox conversion|Change template used]]
* [[:Category:Wikipedia infobox cleanup|Cleanup contents]]
* [[:Category:s suitable for conversion to use Template:Infobox|Convert to use <nowiki>{{</nowiki>Infobox}}]]
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Helpbox
| name = WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar
| class = plainlist collapsible {{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|collapsed |collapsed}}
| float = {{{float|right}}}
| titlestyle = font-size:100%;padding:0.5em;
| title = {{resize|130%|[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Infoboxes|WikiProject Infoboxes]]}}<!--(resized here otherwise [show/hide] link also resized)-->
| headingstyle = font-size:105%;

| list1 = {{raise|0.25em|[[Wikipedia:List of infoboxes|List of infoboxes]]}}

| group2 = Style and help
| list2 =
*[[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Infoboxes|Manual of Style/Infoboxes]]
*[[Help:Infobox]]

| group3 = Cleanup
| list3 =
 {{Sidebar |child=yes |navbar=off
  | heading1 = Talk page
  | content1 =
*{{tl|Cleanup infobox}}
*{{tl|New infobox}}
*{{tl|Infobox requested}}
  | heading2 = Article
  | content2 =
*{{tl|Missing-taxobox}}
 }}

| group4 = Building
| list4 =
*{{tl|Infobox}}
*[[Wikipedia:List of infoboxes/Proposed|List of infoboxes/Proposed]]

| group5 = To do 
| list5 =
* [[:Category:Wikipedia articles with an infobox request|Add infobox]]
* [[:Category:Pages needing an infobox conversion|Change template used]]
* [[:Category:Wikipedia infobox cleanup|Cleanup contents]]
* [[:Category:s suitable for conversion to use Template:Infobox|Convert to use <nowiki>{{</nowiki>Infobox}}]]
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Helpbox
| name = WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar
| class = plainlist collapsible {{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|collapsed |collapsed}}
| float = {{{float|right}}}
| titlestyle = font-size:100%;padding:0.5em;
| title = {{resize|130%|[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Infoboxes|WikiProject Infoboxes]]}}<!--(resized here otherwise [show/hide] link also resized)-->
| headingstyle = font-size:105%;

| list1 = {{raise|0.25em|[[Wikipedia:List of infoboxes|List of infoboxes]]}}

| group2 = Style and help
| list2 =
*[[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Infoboxes|Manual of Style/Infoboxes]]
*[[Help:Infobox]]

| group3 = Cleanup
| list3 =
 {{Sidebar |child=yes |navbar=off
  | heading1 = Talk page
  | content1 =
*{{tl|Cleanup infobox}}
*{{tl|New infobox}}
*{{tl|Infobox requested}}
  | heading2 = Article
  | content2 =
*{{tl|Missing-taxobox}}
 }}

| group4 = Building
| list4 =

*[[Wikipedia:List of infoboxes/Proposed|List of infoboxes/Proposed]]

| group5 = To do 
| list5 =
* [[:Category:Wikipedia articles with an infobox request|Add infobox]]
* [[:Category:Pages needing an infobox conversion|Change template used]]
* [[:Category:Wikipedia infobox cleanup|Cleanup contents]]
* [[:Category:s suitable for conversion to use Template:Infobox|Convert to use <nowiki>{{</nowiki>Infobox}}]]
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Helpbox
| name = WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar
| class = plainlist collapsible {{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|collapsed |collapsed}}
| float = {{{float|right}}}
| titlestyle = font-size:100%;padding:0.5em;
| title = {{resize|130%|[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Infoboxes|WikiProject Infoboxes]]}}<!--(resized here otherwise [show/hide] link also resized)-->
| headingstyle = font-size:105%;

| list1 = {{raise|0.25em|[[Wikipedia:List of infoboxes|List of infoboxes]]}}

| group2 = Style and help
| list2 =
*[[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Infoboxes|Manual of Style/Infoboxes]]
*[[Help:Infobox]]

| group3 = Cleanup
| list3 =
 {{Sidebar |child=yes |navbar=off
  | heading1 = Talk page
  | content1 =
*{{tl|Cleanup infobox}}
*{{tl|New infobox}}
*{{tl|Infobox requested}}
  | heading2 = Article
  | content2 =
*{{tl|Missing-taxobox}}
 }}

| group4 = Building
| list4 =
*{{tl|Infobox}}
*[[Wikipedia:List of infoboxes/Proposed|List of infoboxes/Proposed]]

| group5 = To do 
| list5 =
* [[:Category:Wikipedia articles with an infobox request|Add infobox]]
* [[:Category:Pages needing an infobox conversion|Change template used]]
* [[:Category:Wikipedia infobox cleanup|Cleanup contents]]
* [[:Category:s suitable for conversion to use Template:Infobox|Convert to use <nowiki>{{</nowiki>Infobox}}]]
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23693191906|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Helpbox
| name = WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar
| class = plainlist collapsible {{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|collapsed |collapsed}}
| float = {{{float|right}}}
| titlestyle = font-size:100%;padding:0.5em;
| title = {{resize|130%|[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Infoboxes|WikiProject Infoboxes]]}}<!--(resized here otherwise [show/hide] link also resized)-->
| headingstyle = font-size:105%;

| list1 = {{raise|0.25em|[[Wikipedia:List of infoboxes|List of infoboxes]]}}

| group2 = Style and help
| list2 =
*[[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Infoboxes|Manual of Style/Infoboxes]]
*[[Help:Infobox]]

| group3 = Cleanup
| list3 =
 {{Sidebar |child=yes |navbar=off
  | heading1 = Talk page
  | content1 =
*{{tl|Cleanup infobox}}
*{{tl|New infobox}}
*{{tl|Infobox requested}}
  | heading2 = Article
  | content2 =
*{{tl|Missing-taxobox}}
 }}

| group4 = Building
| list4 =
*{{tl|Infobox}}
*[[Wikipedia:List of infoboxes/Proposed|List of infoboxes/Proposed]]

| group5 = To do 
| list5 =
* [[:Category:Wikipedia articles with an infobox request|Add infobox]]
* [[:Category:Pages needing an infobox conversion|Change template used]]
* [[:Category:Wikipedia infobox cleanup|Cleanup contents]]
* [[:Category:s suitable for conversion to use Template:Infobox|Convert to use <nowiki>{{</nowiki>Infobox}}]]
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Helpbox
| name = WikiProject Infoboxes sidebar
| class = plainlist collapsible {{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|collapsed |collapsed}}
| float = {{{float|right}}}
| titlestyle = font-size:100%;padding:0.5em;
| title = {{resize|130%|[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Infoboxes|WikiProject Infoboxes]]}}
| headingstyle = font-size:105%;

| list1 = {{raise|0.25em|[[Wikipedia:List of infoboxes|List of infoboxes]]}}

| group2 = Style and help
| list2 =
*[[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Infoboxes|Manual of Style/Infoboxes]]
*[[Help:Infobox]]

| group3 = Cleanup
| list3 =
 {{Sidebar |child=yes |navbar=off
  | heading1 = Talk page
  | content1 =
*{{tl|Cleanup infobox}}
*{{tl|New infobox}}
*{{tl|Infobox requested}}
  | heading2 = Article
  | content2 =
*{{tl|Missing-taxobox}}
 }}

| group4 = Building
| list4 =
*{{tl|Infobox}}
*[[Wikipedia:List of infoboxes/Proposed|List of infoboxes/Proposed]]

| group5 = To do 
| list5 =
* [[:Category:Wikipedia articles with an infobox request|Add infobox]]
* [[:Category:Pages needing an infobox conversion|Change template used]]
* [[:Category:Wikipedia infobox cleanup|Cleanup contents]]
* [[:Category:s suitable for conversion to use Template:Infobox|Convert to use <nowiki>{{</nowiki>Infobox}}]]
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
